hero.title: WIN THE
hero.subtitle: Register for free and try your luck to win this legendary brainrot in Steal a Brainrot!
hero.noEditionSub: Come back soon or subscribe to the channel to stay updated!

form.title: Enter the Giveaway
form.subtitle: 100% free — 1 entry per person
form.successSub: A confirmation email has been sent.
form.errorRoblox: This Roblox username is already registered.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

how.title: How does it work?
how.step1Desc: Enter your email and Roblox username. It's free and takes seconds.
how.step2Desc: On the announced date, a winner is randomly selected from all entries.
how.step3Desc: The winner receives the brainrot directly in-game. Announced on YouTube!

winners.title: Previous Winners
winners.subtitle: The lucky winners of past editions
winners.noWinners: No draws have taken place yet.

rulesSection.title: Rules
rulesSection.r1: The giveaway is 100% free. No purchase is necessary to participate.
rulesSection.r2: One entry per person (unique email and Roblox username).
rulesSection.r3: The winner is randomly selected from all entries on the announced date.
rulesSection.r4bold: If you win, your Roblox username will be publicly displayed on this site and potentially announced on the CIT YouTube channel.
rulesSection.r4end: By participating, you accept this condition.
rulesSection.r5: CIT reserves the right to cancel or modify the giveaway in case of force majeure.
rulesSection.r6: The prize (in-game brainrot) will be delivered directly via Roblox. CIT is not responsible for any game limitations.
rulesSection.r7: Any attempt at fraud (fake accounts, bots, etc.) results in immediate disqualification.

draw.title: Draw
draw.subtitle: Click to launch the official draw
draw.alreadyDrawn: A winner has already been drawn for this edition.
